features.name: Logistics & expeditions (proto)
features.description: The split-screen Tactician shell (now the default UI): expeditions, carry/economy, merchant resupply, quest journal, pack bridge between proto and the game store.

features.name: Procedural map generation
features.description: Seeded, deterministic map generation: recipes (city/dungeon/field), stamps, naming, profiles, validation, and the adapter into engine battle terrain.

features.name: Combat engine (core)
features.description: The pure, RNG-free spatial sim: round loop, grid, spatial hash, vision cache, damage/element matrix, adapter from game units to engine inputs. Tested as a black box through the @/engine barrel.

features.name: Save & state
features.description: Versioned slice codecs in a v1:<base64> envelope, per-mode save slots, export/import round-trip, battles persisted as BSNAP tokens.

features.name: City & terrain rendering
features.description: The hand-inked battlemap look: procedural buildings, props, palette, creature skins, and terrain baked to a raster canvas for smooth pan/zoom.

features.name: Combat view (UI)
features.description: BattleView as a mode of the Map tab: compositor-transform token motion, LOD, cast labels, FX, offscreen markers, roster carousel + camera follow, combat reports.

features.name: Offline progression
features.description: catchUp extrapolates rewards from realized rates (warm/cold/sampled) without re-simulating combat; OfflineSummary modal on long absences.

features.name: Stats, leveling & health
features.description: Derived stats at render, level-proportional exp split (anti power-leveling), integer health/KO/recovery/resting, traits, per-unit stat tracking, roster pages.

features.name: Skills & abilities
features.description: Skill definitions and their combat effects: nukes, DoTs, ground zones, buffs, summons, status effects. Only skills change numbers; tactics are pure behaviour.

features.name: Equipment & crafting
features.description: Equip slots (main/off/sideboard/armor/accessory), recipe crafting from learnedRecipes, cards/sockets. NOTE: no dedicated specs - the crafting loop is a known disconnected gap (see BACKLOG).

features.name: Map & locations
features.description: Pannable overworld, regions/dungeons, travel graph, location familiarity, scenarios. Overworld = open-world locations only.

features.name: Consumables / packs
features.description: Heroes carry a pack and use items mid-fight under player use-rules; pack restocks from the stash in town. CONSUMABLE_REGISTRY graded potions; engine decrements counts in-snapshot.

features.name: Battle snapshots
features.description: Deterministic serialize/replay of a live BattleState as a BSNAP token, with an integrity guard. Engine changes must keep replays byte-identical.

features.name: Unmapped: lib
features.description: 3 spec(s) under src/__tests__/lib not yet assigned to a named feature.

features.name: Tactics system
features.description: The player's combat lever: per-channel tactic priority (movement/targeting/action/reaction/passive), per-unit + party loadouts, skill-as-tactic injection and attack re-ranking.

features.name: Movement & pathing
features.description: Barriers/terrain, line-of-sight, kiting, separation, wander/lurk-and-hop, town milling, healer positioning - the spatial movement layer.

features.name: Threat & targeting
features.description: WoW-style aggro: hard taunt > targeting tactics > threat fallback (threat-distance with hysteresis). Threat from damage and healing.

features.name: Open-world combat
features.description: Persistent open-world fields: fog-of-war vision, spawn trickle/cap, hero join/leave reconcile, neutral town NPCs, off-screen crediting.

features.name: Feature unfolding (curated/sandbox)
features.description: Sandbox vs curated modes: gating data + predicates in unlocks.ts, class-change quests, per-mode save slots, fresh-game seeds.

features.name: Performance harness
features.description: Heavy open-world perf seed (?perf=1) and its e2e fps signal.

features.name: Unmapped: dev
features.description: 1 spec(s) under src/__tests__/dev not yet assigned to a named feature.

features.name: Unmapped: store
features.description: 8 spec(s) under src/__tests__/store not yet assigned to a named feature.
